name: cleanup-legacy-web-demos
title: Clean up legacy web demos for RootLens dashboard
creator: elebirds
notes: Removed legacy Streamlit demo and old React/Vite web frontend. Retained FastAPI service as the maintained web-facing backend for future RootLens dashboard rebuild. Verification passed: uv lock --check, uv run --extra dev ruff check ., uv run --extra dev mypy src tests scripts, uv run --extra dev pytest (159 passed), uv run python scripts/run_examples.py.
